tags.expression:
CASE({[.]UPS_Output_Source_raw},
1,0, //Load on Other Module to graphical Normal value
2,6, //Load Off
3,0, //Load on Inverter becomes graphical Normal value
4,2, //Load on Bypass to graphical Load on Bypass value
5,2, //Load on Maint Bypass to graphical Load on Bypass value
6,1, //Load on Battery to graphical Load on Battery value
7,0, //Load on Shared Source to graphical Normal value
7) //Else Unknown
tags.name: UPS_Output_Source

tags.documentation:
Direct Values from Modbus Register
1=Load on Other Module
2=Load Off
3=Load on Inverter
4=Load on Bypass
5=Load on Maintenance Bypass
6=Load on Battery
7=Load on Shared Source
tags.name: UPS_Output_Source_raw

tags.expression:

isGood({[.]Summary_Alarm_Reg_01}) && {[.]Summary_Alarm_Reg_01}=1 || 
isGood({[.]Summary_Alarm_Reg_02}) && {[.]Summary_Alarm_Reg_02}=1 ||
isGood({[.]Summary_Alarm_Reg_03}) && {[.]Summary_Alarm_Reg_03}=1 || 
isGood({[.]Summary_Alarm_Reg_04}) && {[.]Summary_Alarm_Reg_04}=1 || 
isGood({[.]Summary_Alarm_Reg_05}) && {[.]Summary_Alarm_Reg_05}=1 || 
isGood({[.]Summary_Alarm_Reg_06}) && {[.]Summary_Alarm_Reg_06}=1),
1,0)
